description: Preparation records for ratification waves. No row is review evidence or approval unless every gated field is populated and validated.

state_definitions.not-started: Scope is recognized but no candidate revision or formal review has begun.
state_definitions.preparation: Review roles, scope entry points, and blockers are recorded; candidate scope is not frozen.
state_definitions.in-review: An immutable candidate revision and exact document-version manifest are under named review.
state_definitions.changes-requested: Formal review found unresolved blocking changes.
state_definitions.approved: The named approval authority accepted the exact candidate scope with all findings dispositioned.
state_definitions.ratified: The highest required authority ratified the exact candidate scope and promotion records are complete.
state_definitions.superseded: A later wave record replaced this record while preserving its evidence.

waves.title: Repository Governance
waves.approval_authority: Platform Design Authority with independent reviewer
blocking_dependencies: Independent reviewer not assigned
Candidate revision and exact version manifest not frozen
DCA-006 and final governance audit remain open

waves.title: Constitution and Product Foundation
blocking_dependencies: Wave 0 not approved
Founder review not recorded
Measurable product and usability outcomes require review

waves.title: Platform Kernel
waves.approval_authority: Platform Design Authority and Security Authority
blocking_dependencies: Wave 1 not approved
ADR-0007 remains Proposed
First-slice Platform evidence covers only a bounded subset
Production security and operations evidence is absent

waves.title: Architecture and Technology Decisions
blocking_dependencies: Dependent Wave 0 through Wave 2 authority is not approved
Proposed ADRs and conditional technology decisions lack final review
Production deployment and failure evidence is absent

waves.title: Shared Business Engines
waves.approval_authority: Platform Design Authority and affected domain owners
blocking_dependencies: Wave 3 not approved
Engine families remain at mixed readiness
Provider, jurisdiction, and founder gates remain open for consequential engines

waves.title: First-Slice Domains
waves.approval_authority: Platform Design Authority and first-slice domain owners
blocking_dependencies: Wave 2 through Wave 4 not approved
WS2 and later workstreams are incomplete
Capability evidence, UI/accessibility, security, and operations gates remain open
FDR-004 is open

waves.title: Industry and Jurisdiction Pack
waves.approval_authority: Founder, Platform Design Authority, and qualified jurisdiction reviewers
blocking_dependencies: Wave 5 not approved
Qualified Guyana legal, tax, payroll, privacy, and fiscal evidence is absent
Payment/provider certification is absent
Founder scope and provider decisions remain open

waves.title: Commercial Architecture
waves.approval_authority: Founder with Commercial, Finance, Legal, and Platform Design Authority review
blocking_dependencies: FDR-002 and FDR-003 are open
Sellable offer and customer evidence are not approved
Marketplace paid phase remains disabled
Billing/provider and self-hosted commercial evidence is absent

waves.title: Cross-Cutting Assurance Waves
waves.approval_authority: Applicable specialist authorities and Platform Design Authority
blocking_dependencies: Applicable upstream waves are not approved
Independent accessibility, penetration, performance, recovery, migration, privacy, AI, and operational evidence is absent
This aggregate must split into reviewable specialist manifests before review
